hints.text: US territory (counts as US for streaks); mostly **smallcam** (wide round blur + antenna); Gen3 car has a front-right antenna w/ a white dot
**Spanish** on signs (some English); **Wal-Mart** & other US chains common (rare elsewhere in the Caribbean)
Whole island uses phone code **(787)** (also 939) — often written (787) XXX-XXXX
**No front plate** required; US-shape speed signs but **in Spanish**; stop sign = **PARE**
Unique **highway shields** (primary/secondary/tertiary — not in any US state); tall **green km markers** ("km" + a vertical number)
Homes concrete w/ flat roofs + metal gates; **south drier**, mountains in the middle (mostly divided-highway coverage); **Ponce Creole** architecture; colourful Old San Juan
